ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station collecting the data */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the year (e.g., JAN, FEB) */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_month FOREIGN KEY ("month") REFERENCES months ("month_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., JAN, FEB) */,
  "month_number" INTEGER /* Number of the month (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "days_in_month" INTEGER /* Number of days in the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., SPR, SUM) */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Number of the season (e.g., 1, 2) */,
  "start_month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month when the season starts */,
  "end_month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month when the season ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_number" INTEGER /* Number of the year */,
  "is_leap_year" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is a leap year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of temperature */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the temperature was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the temperature data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperatures_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitations" (
  "precip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of precipitation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the precipitation was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the precipitation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity" (
  "humid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of humidity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the humidity was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the humidity data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_speeds" (
  "wind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind speed entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of wind speed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the wind speed was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the wind speed data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_speeds_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_directions" (
  "wind_dir_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind direction entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the wind direction was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the wind direction data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_dir_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_directions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure" (
  "press_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of atmospheric pressure */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the pressure was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the pressure data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("press_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of visibility */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the visibility was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the visibility data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_cover" (
  "cloud_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud cover entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding weather data entry */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover value */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the cloud cover was recorded */,
  "source_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the cloud cover data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cloud_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_cover_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
